mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is held above recent inflation, markets infer persistent policy restrictiveness and term-premium pressure eases growth expectations; over the next 20 trading days the 10-year yield falls as investors price slower policy and weaker real activity.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS > CPIAUCSL inflation pace proxy on a year-over-year basis
failure_condition: Reject if, during tightening episodes, the 20d forward 10-year yield rises in most triggered observations or if the signal is not negative in at least 55% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE with flat or falling PAYEMS signals labor-market deterioration that lowers expected policy rates and inflation persistence; the 10-year yield declines over the next 20 trading days as recession risk is repriced.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3pp over 3 months while PAYEMS growth is negative
failure_condition: Reject if yield changes are not negative after labor-market deterioration triggers, or if the 20d yield move is positive in more than 60% of such cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in RSAFS indicates stronger nominal spending, which raises expected growth and inflation compensation; over the next 20 trading days the 10-year yield rises as markets price more durable demand.
failure_condition: Reject if higher RSAFS levels or positive RSAFS momentum fail to predict higher 20d forward yields, or if the sign is positive in fewer than 45% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO is strong while HOUST is weak, goods-demand pressure exceeds housing supply relief and the market prices firmer real activity and inflation persistence; the 10-year yield rises over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change is positive and HOUST 3-month change is negative
failure_condition: Reject if the combined INDPRO/HOUST condition does not precede a positive 5d yield response or if the average yield change is not greater than zero across triggered samples.

mechanism_narrative: A low unemployment floor after prior tightening signals resilient wage pressure and delayed easing, keeping nominal yields elevated; over the next 60 trading days the 10-year yield rises if UNRATE fails to increase materially.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE remains within 0.2pp of its 6-month low while FEDFUNDS stays above 4.0%
failure_condition: Reject if sustained low unemployment does not coincide with higher 60d forward yields or if yield changes are negative in most triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized slowdown in GDPC1 and RSAFS marks weakening aggregate demand and lower inflation carry; the 10-year yield falls over the next 60 trading days as recession probabilities rise.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth and RSAFS growth are both below their trailing 4-quarter or 12-month averages
failure_condition: Reject if concurrent weakness in output and sales fails to predict lower 60d yields or if the sign is negative in fewer than 55% of triggered episodes.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation remains elevated and FEDFUNDS is still climbing, the market demands a higher real rate path and term premium, pushing the 10-year yield upward over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation momentum is positive and FEDFUNDS is rising month over month
failure_condition: Reject if inflation acceleration plus rising policy rates does not precede higher 20d yields, or if the yield response is positive in fewer than 50% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in INDPRO together with softer PAYEMS indicates cyclical supply and labor weakening that reduces expected real growth and inflation compensation; the 10-year yield falls over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous deterioration in production and payrolls does not precede lower 5d yields, or if the sign is negative in fewer than 55% of observations.
